title: Onboarding welcome screen with user creation and selection
purpose: Provides a welcome interface for new users to enter their name or select an existing user to continue onboarding.
module_context: Exports a React component that manages user state and navigation during onboarding, using localStorage for last user tracking and a custom hook for onboarding context.

steps.content: Initialize state for users, new name, loading status, and error messages.
Fetch existing users from the API when the project context becomes available.
Handle user selection by storing the user ID in local storage and navigating to the dashboard.
Process new user creation by submitting the name to the API and handling success or failure.
Render a loading indicator while fetching users.
Display a form for entering a new user name and submitting it.
Show a list of existing users for returning users to select from.
Store the selected user's ID in local storage for future sessions.
Set the selected user in the onboarding context.
Navigate to the onboarding dashboard route.
Prevent the default form submission behavior.
Validate that a project and non-empty name are provided.
Submit the new user name to the API to create a user.
IF the user creation succeeds, select the newly created user.
IF the user creation fails, display an error message.
